ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the company's website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the contact */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the contact is affiliated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the contact */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the contact was added to the system */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the contact belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the contact */,
  "is_favorite" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the contact is marked as a favorite */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_emails" (
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email address */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact the email address belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of email address (e.g., work, personal) */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the email is the primary email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_emails_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_phones" (
  "phone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone number */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact the phone number belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of phone number (e.g., work, mobile) */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the phone number is the primary phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_phones_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_contacts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., friend, colleague) */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the user added the contact */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the contact is shared with other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "contact_id")
)
